LightningComponentBundle.description: Unified KPI strip + journey rail + adaptive panel (Goals for persons, Opportunities for businesses) for FSC record pages.

property.name: goalBinding
property.label: Goal data source
property.description: FSC managed (FinServ__FinancialGoal__c via PrimaryOwner/Household) or standard (FinancialGoal via FinancialGoalParty junction). 'standard' matches the FSC native FinancialGoals component out-of-the-box. Switch to 'managed' for orgs that only have the FSC managed package data populated.

property.name: lifeEventBinding
property.label: Life Event data source
property.description: FSC managed (FinServ__LifeEvent__c via Client) or standard (PersonLifeEvent via PrimaryPerson.AccountId). 'standard' matches the FSC native Person Life Events component and typically has more rows because Person Account birth/job events are auto-created on PersonLifeEvent. Switching can surface dual-write divergence — events created on one stack post-backfill won't appear on the other.

property.name: cardColumns
property.label: Card columns
property.description: Number of columns in the right-panel card grid. Mock uses 2.

property.name: maxJourneyItems
property.label: Max journey rail items
property.description: Caps the vertical timeline. The controller fetches up to 50; this only governs render.

property.name: panelMode
property.label: Right panel mode (v2 placeholder)
property.description: Reserved. v1 routes by record type. Future v2 will add Relationship and Objectives panels.

property.name: themeMode
property.label: Theme
property.description: default preserves the original mock palette. The 42 alternates pair with profile widgets and the multiclass prediction LWC — pick the same theme on all record-page LWCs for consistency.

property.name: accentColor
property.label: Theme accent (optional)
property.description: Optional #hex (e.g. #b08a4a). Overrides the theme's gold accent. Blank = theme default.

property.name: warningColor
property.label: Theme warning override
property.description: Optional #hex. Override only if you need a non-default warning tint.

property.name: negativeColor
property.label: Theme negative tint
property.description: Optional #hex. Override only if you need a non-default error tint.

property.name: showThemeSwitcher
property.label: Show theme switcher in header
property.description: When true, renders four quick-switch buttons (obsidian/midnight/graphite/ivory). Keep false in production.
